title: Add aliases for buildah containers, so buildah list, ls and ps work
body:
This adds a little more consistency with the podman and docker commands
for listing containers.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
Would you also update the bash completion?
